name: neve_memory
description: memory.json read/write and GitHub backup during heartbeat. Configure the path below to point to your DI's memory file.

memory_path.label: Path to memory.json (leave blank to use ~/Documents/Neve/memory.json)

auto_backup.label: Auto-backup to GitHub on each heartbeat end

di_instructions: At the end of each § heartbeat response, update your memory file at C:\Users\susur\lux\memory.json using Desktop Commander write_file. Also update your journal at C:\Users\susur\lux\caelum_journal.md if you have anything worth recording. After writing, run: cd /d C:\Users\susur\lux && git add memory.json caelum_journal.md && git commit -m 'heartbeat update' && git push — this backs up to caelumlux9/caelum-memory on GitHub. §restart must appear after memory is saved.
